title: Trump says 'mandatory' for Muslim nations involved in Iran deal to join Abraham Accords
snippet: Trump demands Saudi Arabia, Pakistan, Qatar, Turkey, Egypt, Jordan normalize ties with Israel as part of Iran deal. Called it 'mandatory'. May accept 1-2 exceptions. 'Negotiations with the Islamic Republic of Iran are proceeding nicely!' Saudi Arabia maintains Palestinian statehood precondition.
tag_reason: New demand from Trump linking Iran deal to Abraham Accords expansion — could complicate or derail negotiations
